title: EraLend - REKT
relevance_summary: Read-only reentrancy attack on EraLend using SyncSwap LP token burning mechanism

prevention.rule: Block any tx that burns LP tokens and immediately calls a function that relies on reserve values.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that burns LP tokens and immediately calls a function that relies on reserve values.
summary: EraLend lost $3.4M to a read-only reentrancy attack exploiting a callback in the LP token burning mechanism. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing LP token burning followed by a reserve-dependent function call.
